title: Drum loading icon
description: Add some spice when connecting and joining with a lil drum!
body:
Adds a little drumming animation to most loading screens in Minecraft. Something to pass the time as Minecraft connects.

Requires [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) and [MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta).

![The Minecraft "connecting to the server..." screen with an animated drum icon at the top.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f45cf303ffc62d2a32568c1ea35766649e6d6242.gif)

## Notes

- Some loading screens causes Minecraft to stop responding, which freezes the drum. There's nothing I can do about that.
- Currently only officially supports 1.20.1, but it may work on other versions.
